items.title: Hangzhou-based Manycore shares rose 187% early in its Hong Kong debut after raising $156M in its IPO; it is pivoting to selling AI training data to robot makers (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Hangzhou-based Manycore shares rose 187% early in its Hong Kong debut after raising $156M in its IPO; it is pivoting to selling AI training data to robot makers (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Hangzhou-based Manycore shares rose 187% early in its Hong Kong debut after raising $156M in its IPO; it is pivoting to selling AI training data to robot makers (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 总部位于杭州的Manycore公司在香港首次公开募股筹集了1.56亿美元后，其股价在香港上市初期就上涨了187%；它正转向向机器人制造商出售人工智能训练数据（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 总部位于杭州的Manycore公司在香港首次公开募股筹集了1.56亿美元后，其股价在香港上市初期就上涨了187%；它正转向向机器人制造商出售人工智能训练数据（彭博社） / Hangzhou-based Manycore shares rose 187% early in its Hong Kong debut after raising $156M in its IPO; it is pivoting to selling AI training data to robot makers (Bloomberg)
